title: Business Development Manager/ HQ APAC/ A1 Construction Main contractor [MNC]/ receive yr end bonus are welcome
description:
• Up to $14,000 basic + Bonus + Benefits

• Permanent role/ 5 workdays/ HQ located at east area, short walking distance to MRT station.

• Having at least 8 years of BDM/ Commercial and Tendering experience in the construction industry is mandatory.

• Having consultancy network experience in the construction industry is preferred.

• MNC & Leading A1 Main contractor!

Our clients are leading A1 main contractors diverse in civil, building and infrastructure project.

Job Responsibilities:

• The Regional Business Development Manager reporting to Managing Director.

• Responsible for Civil Infrastructure portfolio and Building portfolio.

• Responsible in lead strategic efforts to expand the Company’s presence and revenue streams across the Asia-Pacific region.

• Responsible in identifying new markets, building partnerships, strengthening client relationships, and supporting proposal development.

• Coordinate business development activities across regional offices.

• Identify and pursue new Civil & Building projects opportunities in Singapore and the wider APAC region.

• Develop networks with consultants (e.g. cost/design) to support project leads.

• Grow and maintain relationships with new and existing clients.

• Conduct market research and competitor analysis.

• Lead proposal and presentation preparation for new bids/ Tenders.

• Collaborate with tender teams on RFP responses.

• Represent the Company at industry events and conferences.

• Mentor and guide junior team members.

Job Requirements

• Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Business, Marketing, Finance, or related field.

• Having at least 10 years of experience in the construction industry is mandatory.

• Having main contractor experience in the construction industry is preferred.

Other Information:

To apply please click on APPLY NOW to submit your resume with the following details:

• Reason for leaving each past & current employment

• Salary drawn for each past & current employment

• Expected Salary

• Earliest availability date

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Lionel Cheow

EA License | 14C7092

EA Registration Number | R1105005

postedCompany.description:
At Search Index, we believe in working along closely with our clients in an enduring partnership towards successful career placement. We specialise in identifying and assessing candidates and recruiting them from junior to senior level roles across all industry sectors.

We provides end-to-end solutions ranging from

  • Permanent, Contract, Temporary and Project based placement.
  • Executive Search
  • Payroll and Staff Management

Search Index is committed in providing the highest level of service with our extensive knowledge of human resources, consultancy and search expertise.

We work with Local Small Medium Enterprise (SMEs) and Multinational Companies (MNCs) across various industries.
postedCompany.name: SEARCH INDEX PTE. LTD.
